# Alela, Cunning Conqueror: Faerie & Rogue Tribal (Upgraded Budget)

This version of the deck is optimized for a **$150–$200 budget**, focusing heavily on **Instant-speed interaction** to maximize Alela's token generation on *every* opponent's turn. It follows the "New Era" template but shifts the "Plan Cards" into "Targeted Disruption" to ensure a spell-heavy playstyle.

## 🏹 Strategy & Playstyle

*   **Spell-Heavy Engine:** The goal is to cast at least one spell on every opponent's turn. With 20+ instants and flash-speed creatures, you should almost always be creating a 1/1 Faerie Rogue and goading a threat.
*   **Draw-Go Value:** Use "Engine" creatures like **Nymris** and **Wavebreak Hippocamp** to turn your interaction into card advantage.
*   **The Dragon Finisher:** **Shadow Puppeteers** remains the primary win condition, turning your accumulated swarm of 1/1s into 4/4 Dragons.
*   **Rogue Synergy:** **Notorious Throng** is included to provide an explosive turn, potentially taking an extra turn while creating a massive board.

## 📊 The "New Era" Template Breakdown (Spell-Heavy Variant)

| Category | Count | Status |
| :--- | :---: | :--- |
| **Lands** | 38 | ✅ Upgraded (Shocks, Slows, Utility) |
| **Ramp** | 10 | ✅ Sol Ring, Signets, Talisman, Sword of the Animist |
| **Card Advantage** | 14 | ✅ Nymris, Kindred Discovery, Hippocamp, Emeritus |
| **Targeted Disruption** | 18 | ✅ High Instant Count (Counterspells, Removal, Bounce) |
| **Mass Disruption** | 6 | ✅ Aetherize, Perplexing Test, Curse of the Swine |
| **Plan Cards** | 13 | ✅ Shadow Puppeteers, Obyra, Notorious Throng, Scion |
| **Commander** | 1 | ✅ Alela, Cunning Conqueror |

## 🛠️ Key Re-Introductions ($150-$200 Range)

| Card | Est. Price | Reason for Inclusion |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Kindred Discovery** | $12.00 | The absolute best card draw engine for tribal decks. |
| **Watery Grave** | $11.00 | Essential for speed and fetching. |
| **Shipwreck Marsh** | $7.00 | Excellent untapped dual land for Mid-range. |
| **Notorious Throng** | $6.00 | Explodes our board and potentially takes an extra turn. |
| **Brazen Borrower** | $6.00 | Double duty: Spell trigger + powerful creature. |
| **Swan Song** | $9.00 | Premium 1-mana interaction to protect Alela. |
| **Tegwyll, Duke of Splendor** | $10.00 | Lord effect + card draw when our Faeries die. |
| **Blightwing Bandit** | $10.00 | High-value rogue that steals cards from opponents. |

---

## 📝 Deck Changelog

### 2026-02-21
*   **V3 Update:** Shifted strategy from "Creature-Heavy" to **"Spell-Heavy Flash"**.
*   Increased budget target to **$150-$200**.
*   Re-introduced high-impact staples (*Kindred Discovery*, *Watery Grave*, *Swan Song*).
*   Confirmed inclusion of **Shadow Puppeteers**.
*   Verified against **Bracket 2** rules (No "Game Changers" like *Rhystic Study* or *Cyclonic Rift*).
